messages.content: 翻译At the convergence between treatment and diagnosis, interest has flled in consolidating the two standards into clinically viable defnitions
在治疗和诊断之间的交汇处，兴趣集中于将这两个标准融合为临床可行的定义。
翻译Various techniques related to imaging modalities
与成像模态相关的各种技术
翻译Various formulations along with their theranostic effect
各种配方及其治疗和诊断效果
翻译Various molecular mechanisms have been documented to play roles in mediating cancer cells that escape form the attacks of macrophages.
已有多种分子机制被记录下来，发挥了在介导癌细胞逃脱巨噬细胞攻击中的作用。
翻译to protect themselves from drug exposure
为了保护自己免受药物暴露的影响
翻译Nevertheless, the source and relevance of IL-6 during chemotherapy for solid tumor remains partly described.
然而，IL-6在固体肿瘤化疗过程中的来源和相关性仍未完全描述清楚。
翻译TAMs play essential roles during tumor proliferation, angiogenesis, invasion, metastasis, and immunosuppression and interfere with most standard cancer therapy
肿瘤相关巨噬细胞（TAMs）在肿瘤增殖、血管生成、侵袭、转移和免疫抑制过程中起着重要作用，并干扰了大多数标准抗癌治疗。
